title.en: China-to-Cape Verde Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入佛得角：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入維德角：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Cape Verde IGQPI standards practice, ARME energy-sector regulation, ELECTRA grid-connection review, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interconnection, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V island-grid settings, Portuguese-language IEC/EU legacy expectations, and coastal salt-mist derating — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与佛得角IGQPI标准实践、ARME能源行业监管、ELECTRA并网审查、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互连、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V海岛电网参数、葡萄牙语IEC/EU传统要求以及沿海盐雾降额要求——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與維德角IGQPI標準實務、ARME能源行業監管、ELECTRA併網審查、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互連、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V海島電網參數、葡萄牙語IEC/EU傳統要求以及沿海鹽霧降額要求——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IGQPI standards determination, ARME regulatory approval, ELECTRA grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, EPC contractors, developers, and installers should verify current Cape Verde standards adoption, energy-sector authorisations, ELECTRA connection conditions, Portuguese-language technical documentation, environmental derating, and project-owner or lender specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IGQPI标准裁定、ARME监管批准、ELECTRA并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、EPC承包商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验佛得角现行标准采纳、能源行业授权、ELECTRA接入条件、葡萄牙语技术文件、环境降额以及项目业主或贷款方规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IGQPI標準裁定、ARME監管批准、ELECTRA併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、EPC承包商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗維德角現行標準採納、能源行業授權、ELECTRA接入條件、葡萄牙語技術文件、環境降額以及項目業主或貸款方規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Cape Verde, the key practical gaps are: (1) IGQPI standards and conformity expectations, commonly framed around IEC/EU or Portuguese-language technical evidence; (2) ARME energy-sector approval and project authorisation where generation or grid connection requires regulatory review; (3) ELECTRA distribution or island-grid connection review using Cape Verde's 50 Hz, 230/400 V grid parameters; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interconnection, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) coastal salt-mist, humidity, logistics, and island derating documentation. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence is useful background but is not automatically accepted without supplementary IEC-referenced testing and local project approval. Frequency is the same 50 Hz as China, but voltage differs: Cape Verde is 230/400 V while China is 220/380 V.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口佛得角时，主要实际差距包括：（1）IGQPI标准及合格评定预期，通常围绕IEC/EU或葡萄牙语技术证据；（2）发电或并网需要监管审查时的ARME能源行业批准和项目授权；（3）ELECTRA配电或海岛电网接入审查，使用佛得角50 Hz、230/400 V电网参数；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互连以及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）沿海盐雾、湿热、物流和海岛降额文件。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据可作为背景材料，但没有补充IEC引用测试和当地项目批准时，不会被自动接受。频率与中国同为50 Hz，但电压不同：佛得角为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口維德角時，主要實際差距包括：（1）IGQPI標準及合格評定預期，通常圍繞IEC/EU或葡萄牙語技術證據；（2）發電或併網需要監管審查時的ARME能源行業批准和項目授權；（3）ELECTRA配電或海島電網接入審查，使用維德角50 Hz、230/400 V電網參數；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互連以及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）沿海鹽霧、濕熱、物流和海島降額文件。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據可作為背景材料，但沒有補充IEC引用測試和當地項目批准時，不會被自動接受。頻率與中國同為50 Hz，但電壓不同：維德角為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
